/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/src/tile_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/src/tile_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/src/tile_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/src/transforms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/src/overlap.cpp.o -o milestone1  /opt/homebrew/lib/libtiff.dylib
